channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How to handle anger when someone provokes you in public
item.description: The article explains how to deal with anger when you are provoked or disrespected in public, for example on social media, in the workplace or in public spaces. The writer says that anger is a normal e...

item.title: Gautam Singhania Injured in Maldives Speedboat Accident; Search Underway for Two Missing Indians
item.description: In a recent incident in the Maldives, Gautam Hari Singhania, Chairman and Managing Director of Raymond Group, sustained minor injuries when a speedboat carrying tourists capsized early on Friday near ...

item.title: Jet Fuel Shortages Disrupt Asia Amid Middle East Oil Crisis
item.description: Three weeks into a war in the Middle East between the United States, Israel, and Iran, the Strait of Hormuz has halted shipping, cutting off one-fifth of global oil flows destined for Asia. Jet fuel p...

item.title: Remembering Diana Ferrus: South African Poet and Cultural Activist
item.description: Diana Ferrus (1953–2026) was a remarkable South African poet, storyteller, publisher, editor, and activist, proudly identifying as Khoi and descendant of enslaved people. Born in Worcester during apar...

item.title: Political thugs disrupt ADC Young Women Forum in Eleme, Rivers State
item.description: On Friday, political thugs stormed the first-ever meeting of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) Young Women Forum in Eleme Local Government Area, Rivers State. According to reports from the News Ag...

item.title: Review of The Landmark London Hotel with its Iconic Glass Atrium
item.description: The Landmark London is a five-star hotel located near Marylebone, within easy walking distance of Baker Street and Edgware Road Tube stations. Its proximity to Regent’s Park and the Wallace Collection...

item.title: PM Rejects Fuel Price Hike, Announces New Mechanism for Targeted Relief
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed the nation on the eve of Eidul Fitr, rejecting recommendations to increase fuel prices amidst the global fuel crisis caused by the US-Israeli conflict with Iran...

item.title: Quebec Premier Responds to Doug Ford's Criticism of EV Mandate
item.description: Quebec Premier François Legault has dismissed concerns raised by Ontario Premier Doug Ford regarding the province's electric-vehicle (EV) mandate. Ford had sent letters to Legault and British Columbia...

item.title: AI, productivity and the true purpose of work in the UK economy
item.description: The article explores the United Kingdom’s persistent struggle with weak productivity since the 2008 financial crisis and questions whether simply raising output per hour is the right solution. The gov...

item.title: Steve Ogolla na Ivy Bavolyne wakifanya sherehe ya Eid al-Fitr kwa mtindo na mpenzi wake
item.description: Mshauri maarufu wa sheria Steve Ogolla na mkewe Ivy Bavolyne walifurahia sikukuu ya Eid al-Fitr kwa mtindo, wakizunguka kwenye convertible yao ya kifahari. Wakiwa na furaha, wawili hao walifurahia muz...

item.title: Veteran actor and martial artist Chuck Norris passes away at age 86 surrounded by family
item.description: Renowned American actor and martial arts champion Chuck Norris, best known for his leading role in the television series “Walker, Texas Ranger,” has passed away at the age of 86. According to a family...

item.title: How to rock bold jewellery and retro sunglasses for a standout look
item.description: In the latest edit of luxury fashion, a bold punk-inspired Cartier necklace paired with retro ’90s-style sunglasses are the perfect statement pieces for a glamorous night out. This season's collection...

item.title: How to Manage Mortgage Repayments Amid Rising Interest Rates: Expert Insights
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia's recent interest rate rise has left many homeowners feeling the pinch. As mortgage repayments continue to rise, fixing your mortgage rate could provide some relief, thou...

item.title: Trump-Appointed Counterterrorism Chief Joe Kent Resigns Over U.S. Military Actions in Iran
item.description: Joe Kent, the Trump-appointed Director of the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC), resigned on March 17, 2026, citing moral opposition to U.S. military operations in Iran. A retired Green Beret wi...

item.title: Gabby Ayimba Emerges as Rising Star for Kenya 7s Following Father's Legacy
item.description: Gabby Ayimba, a promising forward for Strathmore Leos, is making waves in Kenyan rugby by stepping into the footsteps of his late father, Benjamin Ayimba, a legendary coach of Kenya's national 7s team...

item.title: Fuel Shortages Hit Nelson Mandela Bay Amid Gulf Conflict
item.description: Petroleum companies in Nelson Mandela Bay have begun limiting fuel supply due to disruptions linked to the ongoing Gulf war, causing widespread shortages and additional costs for consumers. By mid-aft...

item.title: Georgia Hunter Bell: Team GB Captain for World Indoor Championships 2026
item.description: Georgia Hunter Bell, aged 32, has been appointed the captain of Team GB for the 2026 World Indoor Championships in Torun, Poland. A distinguished Olympic, World, and European medallist, Hunter Bell wi...

item.title: Health officials monitor meningitis outbreak in Kent as cases rise but spread slows
item.description: A meningitis outbreak centred in Kent has resulted in two deaths and nearly 30 infections, prompting health officials to warn that the disease could spread beyond the county. According to the UK Healt...

item.title: Four individuals arrested for unauthorized fuel distribution in Albay
item.description: Four individuals were arrested on March 18 in an entrapment operation for the illegal sale and distribution of petroleum products in Guinobatan, Albay. The suspects, identified by their aliases Karl, ...

item.title: Actor Chuck Norris Dies at 86
item.description: American actor and martial artist Chuck Norris, famed for his roles in ‘Walker, Texas Ranger’ and action films of the 1980s, has sadly passed away at the age of 86. His family announced his passing on...
